title: Filter options cross boards in MONDAY
excerpt:
MONDAY are lacking the possibility to filter properly cross boards. 
I can be creating an overview of: 

Where people are assigned (not only one person)
See total number of value or time spent for a person on all boards

…

posts.author: REGR (René Grøn)
posts.cookedHtml:
MONDAY are lacking the possibility to filter properly cross boards.

I can be creating an overview of:

  • Where people are assigned (not only one person)
  • See total number of value or time spent for a person on all boards

We are missing that overview and ability to save those views like reports.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @REGR,

Can we ask if our dashboards feature can help you achieve this? Our dashboards are designed to pull data from across multiple boards, primarily for reporting purposes. We’d love to hear if you have feedback about the dashboards specifically in regard to achieving your end goal here

posts.author: REGR (René Grøn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BiancaT

I have not been able to find a solution in Dashboard. See the attached picture from JIRA, where you have the option to filter across the database and can see the data in column view.
